text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm... I don't see anyone, though. That's weird...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Was it you callin' out to me just now? The Three
Goddesses?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hah, like that's possible! Their mouths are sealed
shut! Hahaha!
